action_set_definitions.name: get_supplier_id
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the unique identifier for a supplier based on their name or partial string match.

supplier_name.description: The name of the carrier/supplier (e.g., 'GOL-77' or 'Global Ocean Link').

action_set_definitions.name: get_voyage_report
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves operational data, incident logs, and specific rollover counts for a particular vessel voyage.

voyage_id.description: The name or ID of the voyage (e.g., 'M/V Northern Jubilee').

action_set_definitions.name: get_quarterly_performance
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the aggregated performance metrics for a supplier for a specific quarter, including total shipments and total rollovers.

supplier_id.description: The unique ID of the supplier.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_performance_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Updates specific scoring categories for a supplier based on audit or voyage findings.

supplier_id.description: The unique ID of the supplier.

score_delta.description: The amount to change the score (positive or negative).

action_set_definitions.name: update_compliance_status
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the final compliance status for a supplier for a specific period.

supplier_id.description: The unique ID of the supplier.

status.description: The final status determined by threshold checks.

evidence_summary.description: A summary of the metrics (e.g., voyage vs quarterly) leading to this status.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_reconciled_scorecard
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers a system-wide reconciliation to ensure all internal scoring parameters match the updated metrics and locks the evaluation for the period.

supplier_id.description: The unique ID of the supplier.

state_description.suppliers: A list of objects representing suppliers, including their IDs, performance metrics, and compliance status.
state_description.evaluation_weights: The weights assigned to different scoring categories (e.g., quality: 0.4, delivery: 0.3, cost: 0.3).
state_description.audit_history: A log of past audits performed on suppliers including dates and results.
state_description.system_metadata: Metadata such as the last calculation timestamp or current evaluation period.

audit_history.finding: INCIDENT REPORT: M/V Northern Jubilee confirmed 22 containers rolled out of 50 booked (44% rollover). Classification: Commercial Rollover - Spot market rates were $2,100 above contract at time of loading. Metric update pending.
